ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow entry */,
  "window_label" TEXT /* Label for the time window of the flow */,
  "window_start" TEXT /* Start time of the flow window */,
  "window_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flow window */,
  "flow_label" TEXT /* Label for the flow type */,
  "flow_key" TEXT /* Unique key for identifying flow characteristics */,
  "forward_metrics_duration" REAL /* Duration of forward metrics for the flow */,
  "forward_metrics_octets" INTEGER /* Total octets transferred in forward direction */,
  "forward_metrics_packets" INTEGER /* Total packets sent in forward direction */,
  "forward_metrics_first_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of first seen in forward direction */,
  "forward_metrics_last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of last seen in forward direction */,
  "reverse_metrics_duration" REAL /* Duration of reverse metrics for the flow */,
  "reverse_metrics_octets" INTEGER /* Total octets transferred in reverse direction */,
  "reverse_metrics_packets" INTEGER /* Total packets sent in reverse direction */,
  "reverse_metrics_first_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of first seen in reverse direction */,
  "reverse_metrics_last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of last seen in reverse direction */,
  "client_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the client */,
  "server_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "client_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the client */,
  "server_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the server */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* Type of protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "geolocation_country" TEXT /* Country where the traffic originated */,
  "geolocation_city" TEXT /* City where the traffic originated */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application generating the traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request log */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow to which this request relates */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of data request (Read, Write, Diagnostic, etc.) */,
  "request_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "response_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response was successful */,
  "response_error" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was an error in the response */,
  "response_malformed" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was a malformed request */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES traffic_flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "data_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the data unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the data unit (e.g., packet, byte) */,
  "unit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow related to this alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Anomaly, Threshold breach) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES traffic_flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow for which the summary is generated */,
  "total_octets" INTEGER /* Total octets transferred for the flow */,
  "total_packets" INTEGER /* Total packets sent for the flow */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the flow */,
  "summary_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the summary period */,
  "summary_end" TEXT /* End timestamp of the summary period */,
  "flow_count" INTEGER /* Number of flows in the summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_summary_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES traffic_flows ("flow_id")
)
